title: Mischief Illagers
description: Adds new custom Illagers, structures and items!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BiEgQKpJ/images/b1df9b12c70fc540de340cc2d265067e9cea4786.png)

**_Mod requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions) to work!_**

Mischief Illagers is a mod that adds new custom Illagers, 4 new structures and a few items, to make raids and exploration harder and a bit more interesting!

---------------

**This mod adds a total of 12 new Illagers, each having unique abilities!**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![All the new Illagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BiEgQKpJ/images/fbcc94511ec4e40eaac856628de0bf2388884c03.png)

**Mischiever:** An evil troublemaker that throws dynamite which combusts and weakens anyone in the blast radius. At one point, it will vanish and turn invisible for a short period of time

**Partyger:** This illager enjoys to party during raids, gifting you a ton of confetti and exploding gifts!

**Imprecator:** A sort of alchemist who throws potions at you and can cast a spell that you should block with a shield or else await getting shocked. Imprecator easily gets distracted by allays, but be aware, if an Allay gets shocked it'll turn into Vex!

**Withermancer:** A grumpy illager who casts flames and withering on its foes, doing it directly

**Libravoker:** An Evoker who spent most of its spare time in a library, now summoning fangs right under your feet and throwing flying books instead of vexes right at you!

**Bass Blaster:** An illager that carries a modified jukebox to blast its target into the air and everyone else away with it!

**Sparkologer:** This illager will simply try to kill you with an iron sword, however it will also dash towards you and jump high to avoid getting hit

**Magnetizer:** Runs around placing magnets that can magnetize mobs and players around, if you are able to avoid the magnet, be ready for Magnetizer to pull you to itself to prevent you from attacking its friends. If its close to death then it will push you away instead

**Photographer:** Will make sure to picture the best moments of, ur   ,su fer inĝ, (brightens your screen)

**Doodler:** Creative Illager uses its imagination and a pencil to draw a doodle replica of either a Creeper, Pillager or Vex, the doodle replicas are notable for being weaker than their original counterpart, but can still be a problem

**Bubbleologer:** Don't judge this fella by its a bit silly looking weapon, as Bubbleologer can jump around you and blast water and giant bubbles, dealing quite a decent damage

**Fangclaw:** A vindicator that lost its arm now has evocation fangs as a replacement. Fangclaw is very tough, despite unable to disable shields, its able to charge at you, making the situation worse
</details>

Additionally, vanilla illagers (except Pillager) and Witch textures were slightly changed and polished
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Changed Illagers (and Witch)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36cc18d18b89465f77e74bcee552402cba088528.png)
</details>

---------------

**Several new items and 4 structures are also in this mod!**

_Items:_
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

All items listed below (excluding Party Horn) can be crafted or dropped from some Illagers!
  
**Imprecation dust:** can be used to make a new potion that gives a new effect - "Shocking" and bad luck. If you put the dust into drinkable potion of shocking, you'll get furious brew, which gives very strong effects with a slight payoff for a while!

**Crazy Dynamite:** can be thrown, it bounces of the ground and moves constantly, before exploding and giving weakness to the ones caught in the explosion

**Magnetizing Magnet:** can be thrown and act just like Magnetizer's magnet, the good part? It sucks in hostile mobs only! So if you wanna trap a crowd for a while, this is a good choice (you can also craft it using Azure and Scarlet Neodymium ingots from Alex's Caves)

**Super Surprise:** what is so super about it? It combusts into flames after a while, setting anyone around it ablaze!

**Party Horn:** cannot be crafted, but can be obtained from Partyger. Just like Partyger does it, blast everybody away!
</details>

_Structures:_
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Imprecator's Hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BiEgQKpJ/images/0d697e5cb8391f9085df60f0e6ed3782af479dcf.png)

**Imprecator's Hut:** In dark oak forests, you may encounter Imprecator's hut, which has trapped allays and has other illagers besides Imprecator, there's also a secret treasure in the closed top of the hut

---------------

![Illagers Fortress House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BiEgQKpJ/images/32a8f44ee08bb2762272904f658d400e8339a6fb.png)

**Illagers Fortress House:** Illagers Fortress House is a guarded house, found in old growth taiga, that has various utilities and loot inside of it, and many illagers too...

---------------

![Withermancer's Shack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BiEgQKpJ/images/0bd259f7ac5a261ded357e80e2bf25b9cc913423.png)

**Withermancer's Shack:** Withermancer's Shack is a settlement found in savannas or dark oak forests, in which Withermancer and 2 other illagers reside in, the main interest is the wither skeleton skull found on a second floor

---------------

![Partyger's Cabin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BiEgQKpJ/images/10d54c9b03d45052e60e6429f62c69d132d5bb81.png)

**Partyger's Cabin:** Partyger's Cabin is a small cabin found in meadows or flower forest, in which Partyger lives in, nothing much can be said, but you can find a lot of chests and a few animals there
</details>

---------------

**Credit**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Chinese localization by luochenlinyu

German localization by fynnlukah, TKG_Sweegy
</details>

**Additional Info**
- This mod will have possible updates in the future

- You can use this mod in your modpack/video

- Made using MCreator (a bit of custom code was used to make the illagers work properly)
